Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8009 "GREMLINS-8009" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Gremlins.prg"
Metadata.Notes: NOP'd out 3 bytes at $8019 (JSR $8F3B) to remove the disk check protection.
